title: 「It’s time to」句型
titleZh: 「It’s time to」句：表示「是時候採取行動」
titleEn: Using It’s time to to signal the moment for action

source.file: Sentence Structure 65 -「It’s time to」句：表示「是時候採取行動」.pdf

formula: It + is / was + time + to + base verb + other information

formulas.formula: It + is / was + time + to + base verb + other information
Subject + know / realise / feel / decide + (that) + it + is / was + time + to + base verb + other information

example: I knew it was time to come back to Hong Kong for my family.
exampleZh: 我知道是時候為了家人回到香港了。

examples.en: I knew it was time to come back to Hong Kong for my family.
examples.zh: 我知道是時候為了家人回到香港了。
examples.highlight: it was time to come back

meaning.zh: 當你認為採取某項行動的適當或必要時機已經來臨時，可以使用這個句型。

rules.en: It is a fixed introductory subject and does not refer to a particular person or thing.
rules.zh: 在這個句型中，it 是固定的形式主語，並不是指某個特定的人或事物。

rules.en: Use a base verb after to.
rules.zh: To 後面必須使用動詞原形。

rules.en: Use is for the present and was for the past.
rules.zh: 使用 is 表示現在是時候行動；使用 was 表示當時是時候行動。

rules.en: The person performing the action is usually understood from the context.
rules.zh: 執行動作的人通常可以從上文理解，不必在 time to 的結構內再次說明。
examples: Dad told me it was time to study.

rules.en: This lesson practises only it is/was time to + verb and embedded forms containing these patterns.
rules.zh: 本練習只訓練 it is/was time to + 動詞，以及包含這個結構的嵌入句；其他相關句式不在本課範圍內。
examples: I realised it was time to leave.

benefits.en: This structure does more than give advice. It tells the listener that the appropriate moment for action has arrived.
benefits.zh: 這個句型不只是提出建議，還能清楚表示採取行動的適當時機已經來臨。

benefits.en: After explaining a problem or change, you can use this structure to show what should happen next.
benefits.zh: 描述問題或變化後，你可以用這個句型清楚指出下一步應採取的行動。

benefits.en: Instead of saying, “You must act now,” you can focus on the action and its timing.
benefits.zh: 相比直接說 You must act now，這個句型把重點放在行動和時機上，語氣較少針對個人但仍然有力。

benefits.en: It is useful when moving from background information to a recommendation, decision or conclusion.
benefits.zh: 在口語或寫作中，這個句型可以幫助你由背景資料自然過渡到建議、決定或結論。

benefits.en: Once you know It is time to…, you can quickly add actions such as leave, begin, review, change, stop or improve.
benefits.zh: 掌握 It is time to… 後，你可以快速加入不同動作，使口語表達更流暢。

en: Rewrite each sentence using it is/was time to + base verb or an embedded form containing this structure. Preserve the original meaning.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 it is/was time to + 動詞原形，或包含這個結構的嵌入形式改寫以下句子。答案必須保留原句意思。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: We should go home now.
questions.promptZh: 我們現在該回家了。
questions.answer: It is time to go home.
questions.answerZh: 是時候回家了。
questions.highlight: It is time to go home.

questions.prompt: The lesson should begin now.
questions.promptZh: 課堂現在應該開始了。
questions.answer: It is time to begin the lesson.
questions.answerZh: 是時候開始上課了。
questions.highlight: It is time to begin the lesson.

questions.prompt: We decided that we should have lunch then.
questions.promptZh: 我們決定當時該吃午餐了。
questions.answer: We decided it was time to have lunch.
questions.answerZh: 我們決定當時是時候吃午餐了。
questions.highlight: We decided it was time to have lunch.

questions.prompt: Mum said that we should turn off the television then.
questions.promptZh: 媽媽說我們當時該關掉電視了。
questions.answer: Mum said it was time to turn off the television.
questions.answerZh: 媽媽說是時候關掉電視了。
questions.highlight: Mum said it was time to turn off the television.

questions.prompt: I knew I should clean my room then.
questions.promptZh: 我知道當時該清理自己的房間了。
questions.answer: I knew it was time to clean my room.
questions.answerZh: 我知道是時候清理自己的房間了。
questions.highlight: I knew it was time to clean my room.

questions.prompt: We realised that we needed to leave for the bus stop then.
questions.promptZh: 我們意識到當時需要出發前往巴士站了。
questions.answer: We realised it was time to leave for the bus stop.
questions.answerZh: 我們意識到是時候出發前往巴士站了。
questions.highlight: We realised it was time to leave for the bus stop.

questions.prompt: Dad told me that I should do my homework then.
questions.promptZh: 爸爸告訴我，當時該做功課了。
questions.answer: Dad told me it was time to do my homework.
questions.answerZh: 爸爸告訴我，是時候做功課了。
questions.highlight: Dad told me it was time to do my homework.

questions.prompt: The plants need water now.
questions.promptZh: 這些植物現在需要澆水。
questions.answer: It is time to water the plants.
questions.answerZh: 是時候為這些植物澆水了。
questions.highlight: It is time to water the plants.

questions.prompt: The children knew they should get ready for bed then.
questions.promptZh: 孩子們知道當時該準備睡覺了。
questions.answer: The children knew it was time to get ready for bed.
questions.answerZh: 孩子們知道是時候準備睡覺了。
questions.highlight: The children knew it was time to get ready for bed.

questions.prompt: Opening time had arrived, so the shopkeeper needed to open the shop.
questions.promptZh: 營業時間已到，所以店主需要開店了。
questions.answer: It was time to open the shop.
questions.answerZh: 當時是時候開店了。
questions.highlight: It was time to open the shop.

questions.prompt: Mia realised that she should apologise to her friend then.
questions.promptZh: 米婭意識到自己當時應該向朋友道歉了。
questions.answer: Mia realised it was time to apologise to her friend.
questions.answerZh: 米婭意識到是時候向朋友道歉了。
questions.highlight: Mia realised it was time to apologise to her friend.

questions.prompt: Ben knew he should replace his old shoes then.
questions.promptZh: 本知道當時應該更換他的舊鞋了。
questions.answer: Ben knew it was time to replace his old shoes.
questions.answerZh: 本知道是時候更換他的舊鞋了。
questions.highlight: Ben knew it was time to replace his old shoes.

questions.prompt: We agreed that we should discuss the problem calmly then.
questions.promptZh: 我們同意當時應該冷靜地討論問題了。
questions.answer: We agreed it was time to discuss the problem calmly.
questions.answerZh: 我們同意是時候冷靜地討論問題了。
questions.highlight: We agreed it was time to discuss the problem calmly.

questions.prompt: The coach decided that the team's training plan should now be changed.
questions.promptZh: 教練決定現在應該更改球隊的訓練計劃。
questions.answer: The coach decided it was time to change the team's training plan.
questions.answerZh: 教練決定是時候更改球隊的訓練計劃了。
questions.highlight: The coach decided it was time to change the team's training plan.

questions.prompt: I felt that I should speak honestly about my concerns then.
questions.promptZh: 我覺得當時應該坦誠說出自己的憂慮了。
questions.answer: I felt it was time to speak honestly about my concerns.
questions.answerZh: 我覺得是時候坦誠說出自己的憂慮了。
questions.highlight: I felt it was time to speak honestly about my concerns.

questions.prompt: The travel date was getting close, so we knew we should book the tickets.
questions.promptZh: 出發日期越來越近，所以我們知道應該訂票了。
questions.answer: We knew it was time to book the tickets because the travel date was getting close.
questions.answerZh: 我們知道是時候訂票了，因為出發日期越來越近。
questions.highlight: We knew it was time to book the tickets because the travel date was getting close.

questions.prompt: The smoke alarm had not been checked for a year, so the landlord agreed that it should be checked then.
questions.promptZh: 煙霧警報器已有一年沒有檢查，所以業主同意當時應該進行檢查。
questions.answer: The landlord agreed it was time to check the smoke alarm because it had not been checked for a year.
questions.answerZh: 業主同意是時候檢查煙霧警報器了，因為它已有一年沒有檢查。
questions.highlight: The landlord agreed it was time to check the smoke alarm because it had not been checked for a year.

questions.prompt: The library books were due that day, so I knew I needed to return them.
questions.promptZh: 圖書館的書籍當天到期，所以我知道需要歸還它們了。
questions.answer: I knew it was time to return the library books because they were due that day.
questions.answerZh: 我知道是時候歸還圖書館的書籍了，因為它們當天到期。
questions.highlight: I knew it was time to return the library books because they were due that day.

questions.prompt: Because the battery was almost empty, Sam knew he should recharge it then.
questions.promptZh: 因為電池快要沒電，森知道當時應該為它充電了。
questions.answer: Sam knew it was time to recharge the battery because it was almost empty.
questions.answerZh: 森知道是時候為電池充電了，因為它快要沒電。
questions.highlight: Sam knew it was time to recharge the battery because it was almost empty.

questions.prompt: After we had discussed every option, we agreed that we needed to make a decision.
questions.promptZh: 我們討論過所有選項後，同意需要作出決定了。
questions.answer: After discussing every option, we agreed it was time to make a decision.
questions.answerZh: 討論過所有選項後，我們同意是時候作出決定了。
questions.highlight: After discussing every option, we agreed it was time to make a decision.

questions.prompt: After reviewing the test results, the doctor said that the amount of medicine the patient was taking should now be reduced.
questions.promptZh: 醫生檢視檢查結果後，表示現在應該減少病人正在服用的藥物分量。
questions.answer: After reviewing the test results, the doctor said it was time to reduce the amount of medicine the patient was taking.
questions.answerZh: 醫生檢視檢查結果後，表示是時候減少病人正在服用的藥物分量了。
questions.highlight: After reviewing the test results, the doctor said it was time to reduce the amount of medicine the patient was taking.

questions.prompt: The school decided that its safety rules needed to be updated then.
questions.promptZh: 學校決定當時需要更新安全規則了。
questions.answer: The school decided it was time to update its safety rules.
questions.answerZh: 學校決定是時候更新安全規則了。
questions.highlight: The school decided it was time to update its safety rules.

questions.prompt: The roof has been leaking for weeks, and the repair can no longer be delayed.
questions.promptZh: 屋頂已漏水數星期，維修工作不能再拖延。
questions.answer: After the roof has leaked for weeks, it is time to repair it.
questions.answerZh: 屋頂漏水數星期後，是時候進行維修了。
questions.highlight: After the roof has leaked for weeks, it is time to repair it.

questions.prompt: We can no longer continue wasting food.
questions.promptZh: 我們不能再繼續浪費食物。
questions.answer: It is time to stop wasting food.
questions.answerZh: 是時候停止浪費食物了。
questions.highlight: It is time to stop wasting food.

questions.prompt: The trees in this area need protection now.
questions.promptZh: 這個地區的樹木現在需要保護。
questions.answer: It is time to protect the trees in this area.
questions.answerZh: 是時候保護這個地區的樹木了。
questions.highlight: It is time to protect the trees in this area.

questions.prompt: After several security problems, the company agreed that it should improve the website's security.
questions.promptZh: 網站出現數次保安問題後，公司同意應該改善網站的保安。
questions.answer: After several security problems, the company agreed it was time to improve the website's security.
questions.answerZh: 網站出現數次保安問題後，公司同意是時候改善網站的保安了。
questions.highlight: After several security problems, the company agreed it was time to improve the website's security.

questions.prompt: Why should we ask for professional advice now? The problem has become too complicated for us to handle alone.
questions.promptZh: 我們為甚麼現在應該尋求專業意見？這個問題已變得太複雜，我們無法獨自處理。
questions.answer: It is time to ask for professional advice because the problem has become too complicated for us to handle alone.
questions.answerZh: 是時候尋求專業意見了，因為這個問題已變得太複雜，我們無法獨自處理。
questions.highlight: It is time to ask for professional advice because the problem has become too complicated for us to handle alone.

questions.prompt: The ward had become noisy, so the nurse decided that the patient should be moved to a quieter room.
questions.promptZh: 病房變得嘈吵，所以護士決定應該把病人移到較安靜的房間。
questions.answer: The nurse decided it was time to move the patient to a quieter room because the ward had become noisy.
questions.answerZh: 護士決定是時候把病人移到較安靜的房間了，因為病房變得嘈吵。
questions.highlight: The nurse decided it was time to move the patient to a quieter room because the ward had become noisy.

questions.prompt: We recognised that the budget needed to be reviewed then.
questions.promptZh: 我們意識到當時需要檢討預算了。
questions.answer: We recognised that it was time to review the budget.
questions.answerZh: 我們意識到是時候檢討預算了。
questions.highlight: We recognised that it was time to review the budget.

questions.prompt: The residents agreed that they should report the broken streetlight then.
questions.promptZh: 居民同意當時應該報告街燈損壞的情況。
questions.answer: The residents agreed that it was time to report the broken streetlight.
questions.answerZh: 居民同意是時候報告街燈損壞的情況了。
questions.highlight: The residents agreed that it was time to report the broken streetlight.

questions.prompt: If the rain stops, that will be the right moment for the match to continue.
questions.promptZh: 如果雨停了，那便是比賽繼續的適當時機。
questions.answer: If the rain stops, it will be time to continue the match.
questions.answerZh: 如果雨停了，便是時候繼續比賽。
questions.highlight: If the rain stops, it will be time to continue the match.

questions.prompt: Dinner should be served when the final guest arrives.
questions.promptZh: 最後一位客人到達時，便應該端上晚餐。
questions.answer: When the final guest arrives, it will be time to serve dinner.
questions.answerZh: 最後一位客人到達時，便是時候端上晚餐。
questions.highlight: When the final guest arrives, it will be time to serve dinner.

questions.prompt: After the equipment had been tested, the experiment was ready to begin.
questions.promptZh: 設備測試完成後，實驗已準備好開始。
questions.answer: After the equipment had been tested, it was time to begin the experiment.
questions.answerZh: 設備測試完成後，便是時候開始實驗。
questions.highlight: After the equipment had been tested, it was time to begin the experiment.

questions.prompt: The manager felt that she should give the team clearer instructions then.
questions.promptZh: 經理覺得當時應該給團隊更清晰的指示了。
questions.answer: The manager felt it was time to give the team clearer instructions.
questions.answerZh: 經理覺得是時候給團隊更清晰的指示了。
questions.highlight: The manager felt it was time to give the team clearer instructions.

questions.prompt: The company should no longer rely on a single supplier.
questions.promptZh: 公司不應再依賴單一供應商。
questions.answer: It is time to stop relying on a single supplier.
questions.answerZh: 是時候停止依賴單一供應商了。
questions.highlight: It is time to stop relying on a single supplier.

questions.prompt: The organisation has not reviewed how personal data is stored for several years. It should do so now.
questions.promptZh: 該機構已有數年沒有檢討個人資料的儲存方式，現在應該進行檢討。
questions.answer: Several years have passed since the last review, so it is time to review how personal data is stored.
questions.answerZh: 距離上次檢討已有數年，所以是時候檢視個人資料的儲存方式了。
questions.highlight: Several years have passed since the last review, so it is time to review how personal data is stored.

questions.prompt: The council decided that more shaded areas should now be created in the park.
questions.promptZh: 區議會決定現在應該在公園增設更多有遮蔭的地方。
questions.answer: The council decided it was time to create more shaded areas in the park.
questions.answerZh: 區議會決定是時候在公園增設更多有遮蔭的地方了。
questions.highlight: The council decided it was time to create more shaded areas in the park.

questions.prompt: We knew we needed to leave then because the roads would soon become crowded.
questions.promptZh: 我們知道當時需要離開，因為道路很快便會變得擠塞。
questions.answer: We knew it was time to leave because the roads would soon become crowded.
questions.answerZh: 我們知道是時候離開了，因為道路很快便會變得擠塞。
questions.highlight: We knew it was time to leave because the roads would soon become crowded.

questions.prompt: The temporary solution has been used for too long, and we now need to replace it with a permanent one.
questions.promptZh: 這個臨時方案已使用太久，我們現在需要以永久方案取代它。
questions.answer: Because the temporary solution has been used for too long, it is time to replace it with a permanent one.
questions.answerZh: 由於這個臨時方案已使用太久，是時候以永久方案取代它了。
questions.highlight: Because the temporary solution has been used for too long, it is time to replace it with a permanent one.

questions.prompt: After checking the data again, the researchers concluded that they should publish their findings then.
questions.promptZh: 研究人員再次核對數據後，認為當時應該發表研究結果了。
questions.answer: After checking the data again, the researchers concluded that it was time to publish their findings.
questions.answerZh: 研究人員再次核對數據後，認為是時候發表研究結果了。
questions.highlight: After checking the data again, the researchers concluded that it was time to publish their findings.

questions.prompt: The team had prepared for months and knew that the new service should now be launched.
questions.promptZh: 團隊已準備數月，並知道現在應該推出新服務。
questions.answer: After months of preparation, the team knew it was time to launch the new service.
questions.answerZh: 經過數月準備後，團隊知道是時候推出新服務了。
questions.highlight: After months of preparation, the team knew it was time to launch the new service.

questions.prompt: After repeated complaints about long waits, the hospital decided that a new booking system should now be introduced.
questions.promptZh: 醫院多次收到有關等候時間過長的投訴後，決定現在應該引入新的預約系統。
questions.answer: After repeated complaints about long waits, the hospital decided it was time to introduce a new booking system.
questions.answerZh: 醫院多次收到有關等候時間過長的投訴後，決定是時候引入新的預約系統了。
questions.highlight: After repeated complaints about long waits, the hospital decided it was time to introduce a new booking system.

questions.prompt: The authorities accepted that public transport remained difficult for older passengers to use and should now be made easier for them.
questions.promptZh: 當局承認長者使用公共交通仍有困難，現在應該讓他們更容易使用。
questions.answer: The authorities accepted it was time to make public transport easier for older passengers to use.
questions.answerZh: 當局承認是時候讓長者更容易使用公共交通了。
questions.highlight: The authorities accepted it was time to make public transport easier for older passengers to use.

questions.prompt: The committee agreed that it should now examine why the project had been delayed.
questions.promptZh: 委員會同意現在應該調查項目延誤的原因。
questions.answer: The committee agreed that it was time to examine why the project had been delayed.
questions.answerZh: 委員會同意是時候調查項目延誤的原因了。
questions.highlight: The committee agreed that it was time to examine why the project had been delayed.

questions.prompt: I knew that I should come back to Hong Kong then for my family.
questions.promptZh: 我知道當時應該為了家人回到香港。
questions.answer: I knew it was time to come back to Hong Kong for my family.
questions.answerZh: 我知道是時候為了家人回到香港了。
questions.highlight: I knew it was time to come back to Hong Kong for my family.

questions.prompt: The engineers had repaired the same error twice. When it appeared again, they realised that they should redesign the process.
questions.promptZh: 工程師已修正同一錯誤兩次。當錯誤再次出現時，他們意識到應該重新設計流程。
questions.answer: When the same error appeared again after two attempts to fix it, the engineers realised it was time to redesign the process.
questions.answerZh: 同一錯誤在兩次修正後再次出現時，工程師意識到是時候重新設計流程了。
questions.highlight: When the same error appeared again after two attempts to fix it, the engineers realised it was time to redesign the process.

questions.prompt: The neighbourhood group felt that another temporary repair was not enough and that it should now ask the council for a long-term solution.
questions.promptZh: 社區小組認為再作一次臨時維修並不足夠，現在應該要求區議會提出長遠方案。
questions.answer: Because another temporary repair was not enough, the neighbourhood group felt it was time to ask the council for a long-term solution.
questions.answerZh: 由於再作一次臨時維修並不足夠，社區小組認為是時候要求區議會提出長遠方案了。
questions.highlight: Because another temporary repair was not enough, the neighbourhood group felt it was time to ask the council for a long-term solution.

questions.prompt: Schools have decided that students should now be taught how to check online information more carefully because false information is spreading quickly.
questions.promptZh: 由於虛假資訊迅速傳播，學校決定現在應該教導學生更仔細地查核網上資訊。
questions.answer: Because false information is spreading quickly, schools have decided it is time to teach students how to check online information more carefully.
questions.answerZh: 由於虛假資訊迅速傳播，學校決定是時候教導學生更仔細地查核網上資訊了。
questions.highlight: Because false information is spreading quickly, schools have decided it is time to teach students how to check online information more carefully.

questions.prompt: The company accepted that it should no longer use packaging that could not be recycled.
questions.promptZh: 公司承認不應再使用不能回收的包裝。
questions.answer: The company accepted that it was time to stop using packaging that could not be recycled.
questions.answerZh: 公司承認是時候停止使用不能回收的包裝了。
questions.highlight: The company accepted that it was time to stop using packaging that could not be recycled.

questions.prompt: After considering the risks and benefits, the government decided that the policy should now be revised.
questions.promptZh: 政府考慮風險與好處後，決定現在應該修訂政策。
questions.answer: After considering the risks and benefits, the government decided it was time to revise the policy.
questions.answerZh: 政府考慮風險與好處後，決定是時候修訂政策了。
questions.highlight: After considering the risks and benefits, the government decided it was time to revise the policy.
